name: 命運輪迴型結尾（因果報應總清算）
description: 結尾以旁白方式快速清算所有反派的下場：養父被殺、白蓮花終身監禁、兩兄弟身敗名裂、生母瘋癲街頭乞討。這種「全員報應」的結尾讓觀眾獲得完整的正義閉環感，也暗合開頭的悲慘場景形成完美環形結構。
tags: 最後一分鐘，以旁白快速收束

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: After this, Derek Lions passed away from his injuries. Mave was sentenced to life imprisonment. It was exposed that Kasam and Xerxes had committed academic fraud and bullying on set, ending their careers. They became the very common people they used to despise. As for Helen, she went completely insane, claiming she had lost a daughter 20 years ago. She begs on the streets every day.
examples.context: 最後一分鐘，以旁白快速收束
